tools.name: owlx_structure_read
tools.description: OwlX structure-score read of a crypto symbol: 0-10 score, LONG/SHORT/WAIT direction, trigger & defense levels, confirmation checks. Free for BTC/ETH; other symbols need an OwlX Pro key (Authorization: Bearer). Educational info, not financial advice.

tools.name: owlx_memesniper
tools.description: OwlX MemeSniper: 5-gate meme/altcoin pre-filter (volume/buy pressure/sustain/chase/BTC) + conviction grade A/B/C + play type + full Cat-Hunter read. Requires an OwlX Pro key. Real hit-rate of past signals is public via owlx_memestats. Educational info, not financial advice.

tools.name: owlx_token_profile
tools.description: Token financial statement (free): DefiLlama protocol/chain TVL, fees & revenue (30d + annualized). Protocol assets get P/F-style income data; L1s get network gas; meme assets honestly report "no on-chain revenue".

tools.name: owlx_memestats
tools.description: Real recorded hit-rate of OwlX MemeSniper signals (free): every signal is logged at fire time and graded against actual prices 4h/24h later — wins AND losses. No cherry-picking.

tools.name: owlx_stock_profile
tools.description: US stock snapshot (free): live quote + financial metrics — P/E, P/S, EPS, margins, ROE, revenue growth, 52-week range, dividend yield, beta (Finnhub, TTM). Educational info, not financial advice.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "owlx_structure_read" references sensitive artifacts (authorization, bearer). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.
